name: freight-export-checkpoint
description: Export readiness + forwarder/exporter role split + doc checklist — not customs or legal advice

steps.text: Skill freight-forwarder-exporter. VERIFY LIVE all destination rules. No invented HS codes or freight rates.

steps.goal: Using skill freight-forwarder-exporter and knowledge/trade/freight-forwarder-exporter.md plus mpi-exporter-help.md when NZ primary/food/fibre may apply, produce: (1) verdict first ready/not ready (2) scope card from user info or explicit questions (3) exporter vs forwarder vs broker vs MPI role-split table (4) document matrix (5) shipment or export-readiness checklist (6) Incoterms coaching only if relevant with year (7) official next steps (8) explicit non-claims. Do not invent regulations, HS codes, or rates.
criteria: No invented HS codes, duty rates, or freight quotes
VERIFY LIVE or official sources for regulatory musts
MPI path referenced if NZ primary/food/fibre in scope
